body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-per-day-log-freshness-2026-04-29

**Closed at:** 2026-04-29T21:51:01.428421+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-cc-mirror-5min-today (S) — CC chat mirror — 5-min refresh of today's file (drop hourly --all)  `done` — Cadence 3600s→300s, dropped --all (default mode = newest session = today). REFRESH_INTERVAL_SEC class constant. 6 new tests pass.
- T-igor-console-midnight-rotate (S) — Igor console.log midnight rotation — new file per UTC day  `done` — rotate_igor_console.py shipped — re-points tmux pipe-pane to today's YYYYMMDD.console.log. Idempotent. Live-validated: today's file (20260429.console.log) created and growing. 12 new tests. Akien adds

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._
